titleStmt.title: SII 38.219: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 219. (A.R. No. 219 of 1912.) TIRUVOṞṞIYŪR, SAIDAPET TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT. On the east, north and west bases of the Naṭarāja shrine, Ādhipurīśvara temple.

summary.p: Ends of both the sides are built in. Commences with the mēykīrtti of the ruler. It registers a sale of land by the assembly peruṅguṟi-mahāsabhā of Sundarachōḷachaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puḻaṟ-nāḍu in Jayaṅkoṇḍachōḷa-maṇḍalam to the temple of Tiruvoṟṟiyūr.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
vaiyiṟ puṇarntu potumai tirn=taṉa taṉṉurimait teviyarāka mārpinil cuṭarmaṇi makuṭamcūṭi neṭu nila maṉṉavar muṟai taṉṉaṭi vaṇaṅka vīramum tiyākamum mārpameṉapRead mārameṉappuṇaintupuṇaintu māpperum pukaḻ kopparakecari [ panma] rāna Uṭaiyār śrī Atirājentri[ devar] kku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa maṇṭalattu puḻaṟnāṭṭu cuntaracoḻac caruppetimaṅkalattu ḷ maṅkalattup peruṅkuṟi mahāsabhaiyom nilavilaiyāvaṇak kaiyyeḻuttu Innāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruvoṟṟiyūr Uṭaiyārkku It tevakaṉmikaḷukku nāṅkaḷ viṟṟukuṭutta nilamāvatu coḻakulatiruvatikku kiḻakkum mummuṭicoḻavatikku teṟkum muṉṟāṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu nālāceturamum Iṅke muṉṟām catirattil kiḻakku
ttil kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam muṉṟu māvum Iṅke nālām catirattil nilam Āṟumāvum Iṅke nālā(m)ṅ kaṇṇāṟṟu muṉṟām catirattu kiḻakkaṭaiya nilam muṉṟu māvum Iṅke nālām catirattu nilam Āṟumāvum teṉ pāṟkkellai tuvārāvatik kālukku vaṭakkumStops here.
Digital edition of SII 38.219 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
